input.command:
THRESHOLD="2026-05-15"
echo "Checking SSL for custom-domain installs..."
echo ""

check_ssl() {
  local id="$1" name="$2" account="$3" domain="$4"
  local out
  out=$(nexus wpe ssl --json "$id" 2>&1 | grep -v "Update available\|Run:")
  if echo "$out" | jq -e '.certificates' > /dev/null 2>&1; then
    echo "$out" | jq -r --arg name "$name" --arg account "$account" --arg threshold "$THRESHOLD" \
      '.certificates[] | 
       (.expires_time[0:10]) as $exp |
       (if $exp <= $threshold then "EXPIRING_SOON" elif .status != "ENABLED" then "STATUS_ISSUE" else "OK" end) as $flag |
       select($flag != "OK") |
       [$flag, $account, $name, .common_name, .status, $exp] | @tsv'
  fi
}
